title: aster ovalifolius
intro: Aster ovalifolius, also known as the Blue Wood's Aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Aster ovalifolius include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Aster ovalifolius is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of salves or creams to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
